children.heading: Expansion and coordination of activities
children.label: a Expansion and coordination of activities
children.text: The Director of the Institute, in consultation with the National Cancer Advisory Board, shall expand, intensify, and coordinate the activities of the Institute with respect to research on breast cancer, ovarian cancer, and other cancers of the reproductive system of women.

children.heading: Coordination with other institutes
children.label: b Coordination with other institutes
children.text: The Director of the Institute shall coordinate the activities of the Director under subsection (a) with similar activities conducted by other national research institutes and agencies of the National Institutes of Health to the extent that such Institutes and agencies have responsibilities that are related to breast cancer and other cancers of the reproductive system of women.1So in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1

children.label: A
children.text: basic research concerning the etiology and causes of breast cancer;

children.label: B
children.text: clinical research and related activities concerning the causes, prevention, detection and treatment of breast cancer;

children.label: C
children.text: control programs with respect to breast cancer in accordance with , including community-based programs designed to assist women who are members of medically underserved populations, low-income populations, or minority groups;section 285a–1 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: information and education programs with respect to breast cancer in accordance with ; andsection 285a–2 of this title

children.label: E
children.text: research and demonstration centers with respect to breast cancer in accordance with , including the development and operation of centers for breast cancer research to bring together basic and clinical, biomedical and behavioral scientists to conduct basic, clinical, epidemiological, psychosocial, prevention and treatment research and related activities on breast cancer.section 285a–3 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: The Director of the Institute shall ensure that the research programs described in paragraph (1) are implemented in accordance with a plan for the programs. Such plan shall include comments and recommendations that the Director of the Institute considers appropriate, with due consideration provided to the professional judgment needs of the Institute as expressed in the annual budget estimate prepared in accordance with section 285a–2(9) of this title. The Director of the Institute, in consultation with the National Cancer Advisory Board, shall periodically review and revise such plan.2So in original. Probably should be section “285a–2(b)(9)”.2

children.label: B
children.text: Not later than , the Director of the Institute shall submit a copy of the plan to the President’s Cancer Panel, the Secretary and the Director of NIH.October 1, 1993

children.label: C
children.text: The Director of the Institute shall submit any revisions of the plan to the President’s Cancer Panel, the Secretary, and the Director of NIH.

children.label: D
children.text: The Secretary shall provide a copy of the plan submitted under subparagraph (A), and any revisions submitted under subparagraph (C), to the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Labor and Human Resources of the Senate.
basic research concerning the etiology and causes of ovarian cancer and other cancers of the reproductive system of women;
clinical research and related activities into the causes, prevention, detection and treatment of ovarian cancer and other cancers of the reproductive system of women;
control programs with respect to ovarian cancer and other cancers of the reproductive system of women in accordance with ;section 285a–1 of this title
information and education programs with respect to ovarian cancer and other cancers of the reproductive system of women in accordance with ; andsection 285a–2 of this title
research and demonstration centers with respect to ovarian cancer and cancers of the reproductive system in accordance with .section 285a–3 of this title
a description of the research plan with respect to breast cancer prepared under subsection (c);
an assessment of the development, revision, and implementation of such plan;
a description and evaluation of the progress made, during the period for which such report is prepared, in the research programs on breast cancer and cancers of the reproductive system of women;

a summary and analysis of expenditures made, during the period for which such report is made, for activities with respect to breast cancer and cancers of the reproductive system of women conducted and supported by the National Institutes of Health; and
such comments and recommendations as the Director considers appropriate.
